segments.original_text: ダイヤ武器もう一回ね

segments.text: It wouldn't be strange for it to appear on the final stock!
segments.original_text: 最終ストックで現れることもおかしくはないですね

segments.text: Don't get caught up in that diamond's destructive power
segments.original_text: ダイヤの破壊力に惑わされず

full_text: They're mining here Diamond weapon again! It wouldn't be strange for it to appear on the final stock! Don't get caught up in that diamond's destructive power Immediately Right here

corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 惚れ→掘れ (mining context)
